Name: Week 0 - Discovery Review with Shelley
Description: Discovery Review week. Walked through JobTread System Diagnostic findings with Shelley on April 7. Rob jumped on a quick call mid-week with customer-entry questions.

Name: Training Plan & System Strategy Alignment
Description: Shelley & Megan working call. Nick (RenoBooks) & Megan — training plan and architecture alignment; recap sent to Nick, Shelley, Rob, and Ryan. Rob requested a walkthrough call before moving forward. Austin Woo / RBA x JobTread Integration session — lead gen and system strategy; Nick's playbook shared.

Name: Implementation Sequence Lock-In
Description: RBA Weekly with Ryan, Shelley, Rob. Locked in implementation sequence and timeline. Decisions: time clock switch happening, full-team kickoff April 22, compliance target May 1, April 22–30 ramp-up window. Following existing playbook as-is for first 4-6 weeks. Cascade: Time tracking → Schedules → Client-facing access → Financials. Jobs ending by end of May finish in BuilderTrend; anything past June 1 moves to JobTread; no new jobs in BuilderTrend.

Name: Official Team Kickoff - Time Clock Launch
Description: Official JobTread Kickoff with full 20+ person team on April 22. Time clock transition begins; ramp-up window through April 30.
